node.text: Maria wants to work together with John to create a safe and bustling environment for the community and others, to make real change.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "run for office decision") on Session 14 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Maria believes that even minor tweaks to the system can make a big difference for many people.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "run for office decision") on Session 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: When Maria was younger, her family had money problems and had to rely on help from their auntie, teaching her the importance of helping others in need.
Maria is willing to work with John on a community project regarding infrastructure to get the neighborhood's backing.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "run for office decision") on Session 14 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Maria values positivity and optimism, even in tough situations.
